_comment: Hand-maintained baseline dictionary of common ASR mishearings for legal/medical depositions. Applied as a base layer in spec_engine/corrections.py:_build_corrections_map; per-case NOD spellings (confirmed_spellings) override these. Keys are case-insensitive and matched on word boundaries. Entries that conflict with spec_engine.corrections.LEGAL_TERMS (objection, form, foundation, privilege as bare single words) are silently dropped — that blocklist is intentional. Add entries here as you confirm them across multiple cases; one-off case-specific names belong in the NOD's confirmed_spellings, not here.
